inline_comments: Attempt to restart this process with a fresh PID. - supervised environments (launchd/systemd/schtasks): caller should exit and let supervisor restart - OPENCLAW_NO_RESPAWN=1: caller should keep in-process restart behavior (tests/dev) - otherwise: spawn detached child with current argv/execArgv, then caller exits
Hand off launchd restarts to a detached helper before exiting so config
reloads and SIGUSR1-driven restarts do not depend on exit/respawn timing.
Detached respawn is unsafe on Windows without an identified Scheduled Task:
the child becomes orphaned if the original process exits.

functions.name: restartGatewayProcessWithFreshPid
